name: Get Top List Names
summary: Returns the list of available Top List basket/criteria pairs (e.g. NSEBL/VOLUME, NSEEQ/LTP, NSEALL/VALUE) for a given exchange. The returned bskt + crt pairs are the inputs to the Get Top List (TopList) request.

request_params.name: jData
request_params.description: Should send json object with fields in below list (the uid/exch JSON body, url-style appended before jKey).

response_fields.name: request_time
response_fields.description: This will be present only in a successful response.

response_fields.name: emsg
response_fields.description: This will be present only in case of errors.

response_fields.name: bskt
response_fields.description: Basket name (field inside each Basket, Criteria pair object in the values array).

response_fields.name: crt
response_fields.description: criteria (field inside each Basket, Criteria pair object in the values array).

notes:
- The jData JSON is url-style appended to jKey in the request body: jData={...}&jKey=...; Content-Type is application/json.
- The curl example uses a placeholder host 'https://BaseURL/TopListName'; the real base URL is https://piconnect.flattrade.in/PiConnectAPI (so the full endpoint is .../PiConnectAPI/TopListName).
- Each element of the values array is a "Basket, Criteria pair object" with fields bskt (basket name) and crt (criteria). These pairs are the inputs to the Get Top List (TopList) endpoint.
- request_time format is HH:MM:SS DD-MM-YYYY (e.g. 13:08:22 03-06-2020).
- Source artifact: in the success response one crt value is shown with a curly closing quote ("VALUE”) instead of a straight quote — preserved verbatim; the intended value is "VALUE".
- Source layout note: page 48's GET TOP LIST NAMES title begins at the bottom of the page, and the Sample Output block above it (idxname/token pairs, e.g. Nifty 50/26000) belongs to the neighbouring Get Index List response, NOT this endpoint. Page 49 is authoritative for this section's response shape (bskt/crt fields + labelled Sample Success/Failure Response blocks).
issues: The authoritative endpoint, query parameters, jData fields (uid*, exch*), response fields, curl block, and sample success/failure responses are all clearly shown on page 49 (the TopListName page). Page 48's right-column 'Sample Output' (idxname/token pairs) sits under the GET TOP LIST NAMES title that begins at the bottom of page 48 but uses idxname/token fields rather than the bskt/crt fields documented on page 49's body — it is a leftover from a neighbouring Get Index List style response; page 49 is treated as authoritative for this section's response shape since it carries the matching bskt/crt field tables and labelled Sample Success/Failure Response blocks. The straight-quote vs curly-quote artifact on the 'VALUE”' entry is the only character ambiguity, preserved verbatim and noted.
